name: Device parameter metadata + DB model
description: Add a device_params table and sqlc queries for storing and retrieving device configuration parameters (key-value pairs per device).
acceptance_criteria: sql/migrations/ contains a migration adding device_params table
device_params table: device dongle_id FK, key TEXT, value TEXT, updated_at, unique on (dongle_id, key)
sql/queries/device_params.sql has CRUD queries: get, set (upsert), list by device, delete
sqlc generate produces updated code in internal/db/ without errors
go build and go vet pass cleanly
